description: A firm has received a large production of documents from the opposing party. A paralegal needs to organize them.

nodes.task_description: Load the received documents into the e-discovery platform.
Perform OCR (Optical Character Recognition) on all documents to make them text-searchable.

expected_outcome.expected: All image-based documents are now searchable.

nodes.task_description: Organize the documents by custodian (the person they came from) and date to prepare for review.

expected_outcome.expected: The documents are logically organized for the review team.
